MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Text Ruling

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:

Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Carmel Dula.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ralph Cooper is present.
Attorney Matt Tolve, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
